title: Oni-Mai
description: This is a ONI MAI ! Anime Themed Pack. Adds: (GUI (Inventory, Menu BG, Menu Logo) Music and Fonts)
body:
**Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack is themed around the show "ONI-MAI" You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top.

![Featured Images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aMIDP0jx/images/5b84f4ef2cb90682644dc7794b85f041de60a0a9.png)

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/83SJPnncCA) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️

![Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aMIDP0jx/images/08d1c524a210716b757d80bf545fc3cf60cc2558.png)

With **Menu Music**

![Large Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aMIDP0jx/images/80ad98a469b7f281d273d4601ed3635fb408ec32.png)

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aMIDP0jx/images/7a62ef487fa222c34d4a9fc97f7e06f0f5e13f9f.png)

And more with **custom** images!
